title: General Clothing Provision * Homeless Men - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > General Clothing Provision * Homeless Men 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV At Risk Youth Homeless Families Homeless Men Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BOISE RESCUE MISSION MINISTRIES RIVER OF LIFE MEN'S SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers emergency meals, shelter, and clothing. Shelter services include education, job search assistance, and mental health counseling. 575 S 13th Street Boise, ID 83702 Eligibility: Shelter and clothing: Men experiencing homelessness with a focus on veterans Meals: Unrestricted Hours: Shelter: Check in 4pm-5:30pm Dinner: 5pm for community guests including women and children Email (208) 389-9840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
